notes: Mobile section-head rows ('ACCOUNT BALANCES', 'INFLOWS', etc.) were wrapping letter-by-letter into narrow stacks because they inherited word-break: break-word !important from .proj-table tbody th. Section labels are short and should never break mid-word. Fixed: override word-break, overflow-wrap, white-space back to 'normal' for section-head th specifically. Also reduced letter-spacing 0.12em → 0.06em on mobile so the text doesn't stretch as wide.
